sections.paragraph:
in Kal only occurring three times, inf. חֲבֹק Ecc 3:5, part. חֹבֵק Ecc 4:5 2Ki 4:16, elsewhere only in Piel.

Piel חִבֵּק fut. יְחַבֵּק part. מְחַבֵּק-

(1) to embrace, followed by an acc. Gen 33:4 Pro 4:8 5:20 followed by a dat. Gen 29:13 48:10 . To embrace the rock, the dunghill, for to lie, or make one’s bed, on them, Job 24:8 Lam 4:5.

(2) with the addition of יָדַיִם to fold the hands (spoken of an idle man), Ecc 4:5. Hence-
